Patch Set 2: Code-Review-1

It seems that this patch failed replay-single test_90 itself, so it doesn't seem to be fixing the problem?  

It would be good for future versions of the patch to use:

 Test-Parameters: trivial testlist=replay-single,replay-single,replay-single,replay-single

so that this test is run several times and not to spend time on the other tests.

Patch Set 2:

It looks like test_89 is skipped for ZFS, so there may need to be a similar check added to the end of test_88, or at the start of test_90 (in case the tests are not run in order).
Uploaded patch set 3.

parents.subject: LU-7759 llite: handle inactive OSTs better in statfs

commit.subject: LU-4039 tests: ensure osc import in FULL state
commit.message:
LU-4039 tests: ensure osc import in FULL state

The osp import may not in FULL state when
replay-single:test_90 start running. It
was caused by test_89, we should waiting
import valid then start next step.

Test-Parameters: trivial testlist=replay-single,replay-single,replay-single,replay-single
Signed-off-by: Yang Sheng <yang.sheng@intel.com>
Change-Id: I93746137c038183bf114619f53654af1bcaa68eb
Reviewed-on: http://review.whamcloud.com/20931
Tested-by: Jenkins
Tested-by: Maloo <hpdd-maloo@intel.com>
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <andreas.dilger@intel.com>
